translation_text.sn23.46:1.2: When Venerable RΡ¹dha was seated to one side, the Buddha said to him:
translation_text.sn23.46:1.3: βÄ€RΡ¹dha, you should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is liable to cease.
translation_text.sn23.46:1.4: And what is liable to cease?
translation_text.sn23.46:1.5: Form is liable to cease. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
translation_text.sn23.46:1.9: Consciousness is liable to cease. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
